[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

It's a new Pick-Up Recruitment! The only one more hyped for 3/28 is Utaha herself!
Pick-Up Headliner: 3★ Utaha (Cheer Squad)

Pick-Up Period: 3/28 (Tue) After Maintenance – 4/11 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
